output_aliases.sweep_mcr_pairing_labels_by_model: Sweep MCR Pairing Labels by Model

passforward.description: Expose selected MCR-ALS outputs as routed downstream inputs when enabled.

short_description: MCR-ALS (pyMCR) decomposition with optional calibration, sweep, and cross-validation.
long_description: Fits MCR-ALS to unfolded calibration data using pyMCR, estimates concentration/spectral profiles, and optionally maps components to Y targets for calibration and validation prediction.

layout.name: n_components
layout.label: Number of Components
layout.tooltip: Number of components to extract.

layout.name: max_iter
layout.label: Maximum Iterations
layout.tooltip: Maximum number of iterations for the fitting algorithm.

layout.name: tol
layout.label: Tolerance
layout.tooltip: Convergence tolerance for the fitting algorithm.

layout.name: random_state
layout.label: Random Seed
layout.tooltip: Random seed for reproducibility. Can be an integer or 'None' for no fixed seed.

layout.name: constraint_non_negative
layout.label: Non-negative
layout.tooltip: Enable non-negativity for C and/or S.

layout.name: constraint_non_negative_mode_c
layout.label: Non-negative Mode (C)
layout.tooltip: C mode: NNLS uses non-negative solver; Project applies non-negative projection after solve; NNLS + Project does both.

layout.name: constraint_non_negative_mode_st
layout.label: Non-negative Mode (S)
layout.tooltip: S mode: NNLS uses non-negative solver; Project applies non-negative projection after solve; NNLS + Project does both.

layout.name: constraint_cumsum_non_negative
layout.label: Cumsum Non-negative
layout.tooltip: Apply cumulative-sum non-negativity along each profile vector.

layout.name: constraint_zero_end_points
layout.label: Zero End Points
layout.tooltip: Force profile endpoints toward zero by baseline subtraction.

layout.name: constraint_zero_end_points_span
layout.label: Zero End Points Span
layout.tooltip: Number of points averaged at each edge for zero-end correction.

layout.name: constraint_zero_cumsum_end_points
layout.label: Zero Cumsum End Points
layout.tooltip: Center cumulative-sum segments to near zero, optionally using node boundaries.

layout.name: constraint_zero_cumsum_nodes
layout.label: Zero Cumsum Nodes
layout.tooltip: Optional 1-based node indices, e.g. 3,7,10

layout.name: constraint_normalize
layout.label: Normalize
layout.tooltip: ConstraintNorm in pyMCR.

layout.name: constraint_cut_below
layout.label: Cut Below
layout.tooltip: Set values below threshold to zero.

layout.name: constraint_cut_below_value
layout.label: Cut Below Value
layout.tooltip: Threshold used by Cut Below.

layout.name: constraint_cut_above
layout.label: Cut Above
layout.tooltip: Set values above threshold to zero.

layout.name: constraint_cut_above_value
layout.label: Cut Above Value
layout.tooltip: Threshold used by Cut Above.

layout.name: constraint_compress_below
layout.label: Compress Below
layout.tooltip: Clamp values below threshold up to the threshold value.

layout.name: constraint_compress_below_value
layout.label: Compress Below Value
layout.tooltip: Threshold used by Compress Below.

layout.name: constraint_compress_above
layout.label: Compress Above
layout.tooltip: Clamp values above threshold down to the threshold value.

layout.name: constraint_compress_above_value
layout.label: Compress Above Value
layout.tooltip: Threshold used by Compress Above.

layout.name: constraint_replace_zeros
layout.label: Replace Zeros
layout.tooltip: Replace zero-sum rows with a fallback one-hot profile.

layout.name: constraint_replace_zeros_feature
layout.label: Replace Zeros Feature
layout.tooltip: 1-based feature index used by ConstraintReplaceZeros.

layout.name: constraint_replace_zeros_fval
layout.label: Replace Zeros F-Value
layout.tooltip: Total magnitude assigned to replacement rows.

layout.name: constraint_planarize
layout.label: Planarize
layout.tooltip: Fit selected columns to a smooth plane over a 2D reshaped grid.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_targets_c
layout.label: Planarize Targets (C)
layout.tooltip: Optional 1-based column indices for C planarization.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_shape_c
layout.label: Planarize Shape (C)
layout.tooltip: rows,cols where rows*cols equals number of C rows in fit matrix.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_targets_st
layout.label: Planarize Targets (S)
layout.tooltip: Optional 1-based column indices for S planarization.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_shape_st
layout.label: Planarize Shape (S)
layout.tooltip: rows,cols where rows*cols equals number of S rows (components).

layout.name: constraint_planarize_use_vals_above
layout.label: Planarize Use Values Above
layout.tooltip: Optional lower bound filter when fitting the plane.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_use_vals_below
layout.label: Planarize Use Values Below
layout.tooltip: Optional upper bound filter when fitting the plane.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_lims_to_plane
layout.label: Planarize Limit To Plane
layout.tooltip: Limit planarized values to optional above/below bounds.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_scaler
layout.label: Planarize Scaler
layout.tooltip: Optional explicit scaler used for planar fit coordinate magnitudes.

layout.name: constraint_planarize_recalc_scaler
layout.label: Planarize Recalculate Scaler
layout.tooltip: Recompute planarization scaler for each call instead of reusing it.

layout.name: sweep_mode
layout.label: Sweep Components
layout.tooltip: Off: disable sweep. Stats only: compute sweep scree metrics only. On: compute sweep scree metrics and expose sweep-model pages.

layout.name: component_range
layout.label: Component Range
layout.tooltip: Component counts to sweep when sweep mode is enabled. Examples: 2:6, 2-8, 2,3,4.

layout.name: validation_processing
layout.label: Validation Processing
layout.tooltip: Batch: adds all validation/test samples at once. Sample by Sample: fits one model per validation/test sample.

layout.name: aug_direction
layout.label: S Profile Direction
layout.tooltip: 1-based index of the non-sample mode that maps to the S (spectral) axis. All other non-sample modes are unfolded into C rows.

layout.name: c_aggregation_method
layout.label: C Aggregation Method
layout.tooltip: Method used to aggregate concentration rows per sample when fitting augmented (multiway) data. Area: trapezoid integral; Max: maximum value; Min: minimum value.

layout.name: mcr_component_y_mapping
layout.label: Component-Y Mapping
layout.tooltip: One entry per component: Y column index (1-based). Empty entry excludes that component. If all are empty, all valid component-to-Y combinations are evaluated automatically.

layout.name: y_labels
layout.label: Y Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed from upstream labels source; hidden in direct user setup.

layout.name: cv_config
layout.label: Cross-Validation Config
layout.tooltip: Routed from CV configuration step; hidden in direct user setup.

config.title: C Scores Heatmap (All Samples x Components)
C Scores Heatmap (All Samples x Components)
C Profiles (Unfolded Rows, Model for Val Sample)
S Profile Cosine Similarity Between SBS Models

Validation Predictions, References, and Error (Sweep Model)

sections.short_description: Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of calibration predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased calibration.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of validation predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
EJCR for calibration OLS slope/intercept in each sweep model and pairing.
EJCR for validation OLS slope/intercept in each sweep model and pairing.
EJCR for the calibration OLS fit of the MCR-ALS model built for each validation sample. Navigate by pairing and by validation sample (model index).

config.title: Validation EJCR (Aggregated Over All Val Samples)

sections.short_description: EJCR for the validation OLS fit, computed by aggregating all validation samples across SBS models. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
